since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.33%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC +0.21% · Gold +1.27% · Nasdaq100 -1.01%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.33%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.33%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.69%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.69%, WDAY +7.61%, DV +7.39%, APP +7.07%, PUBM +7.04%. Laggards: TER -8.32%, VRT -7.17%, NXPI -6.99%, HPE -6.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.01% at $151.45
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
